<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep this lean - delete sections that don't apply. -->

## What and why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: "Closes #123". -->

## How it was tested

- [ ] `tox` (or `pytest`) passes
- [ ] `pyflakes src tests` is clean
- [ ] Tested on real hardware <!-- which plotter / adapter, or "n/a" -->

<!-- For device/timing/protocol changes, a short verbose-log excerpt showing the
     before/after behavior is very helpful. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Logging only (no `print`), ASCII-only output, descriptive names
- [ ] New behavior has a test (or I've explained why it can't be unit-tested)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (README / `--help` / DESIGN.md)
- [ ] Commit messages are clear (the release changelog is generated from them)
